summary: First iteration. Backend (9/9 pytest tests) and Frontend (all sections, waitlist flows, emotion tabs, FAQ, nav) fully verified on the Lucy/Dexalab landing page. Zero JS console/page errors. Hero + Footer waitlist forms both POST to backend and render position results. Duplicate email correctly shows 'DUPLICATE NEURAL ID'. Case-insensitive duplicate detection works.

minor.issue: On duplicate email the API returns the CURRENT total count as 'position' rather than the original position of that email. This is consistent with frontend UX wording ('DUPLICATE NEURAL ID') but the returned position number is not the user's actual queue position. Consider storing/looking up original index if precise position matters.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: duplicate-email branch returns total count as 'position' (not the original signup position). Low-priority semantic issue.

server.py: CORS allow_origins='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec (browsers will reject credentialed requests). Currently no cookies/credentials used so works, but tighten before adding auth.
server.py: no unique index on waitlist.email — race condition could allow duplicates under concurrent submissions. Add db.waitlist.create_index('email', unique=True) at startup.
Hero.jsx & WaitlistCTA.jsx: duplicated waitlist form logic (~30 lines) — extract a shared useWaitlist hook to DRY up.
Frontend: no loading skeleton/spinner shown between submit and result — only button label changes (acceptable, minor).
Footer social link uses generic https://twitter.com / https://github.com URLs instead of real Dexalab handles.
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_*@example.com waitlist entries inserted via pytest and UI runs. They are persistent in MongoDB but harmless (prefixed for easy cleanup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (9 tests, all passing). Frontend Playwright flow covers all 7 sections, 6 feature cards, both waitlist forms (hero+footer), 5 emotion tabs, FAQ accordion, nav anchor scroll, and duplicate-email path. Production URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. No mocked APIs. No auth.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA. All tested flows work end-to-end.
